docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MONKEY BRAINS
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-18-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ALEJANDRO MENENDEZ FILED BY DEFENDANT MONKEY BRAINS
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY COFFA, JULIA TERESA MONKEY BRAINS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JULIA TERESA COFFA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MONKEY BRAINS (ALEJANDRO MENENDEZ) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,060.00 FILED BY COFFA, JULIA TERESA AS TO DEFENDANT MONKEY BRAINS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED FEB-10-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MONKEY BRAINS
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ALEJANDRO MENENDEZ FILED BY DEFENDANT MONKEY BRAINS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COFFA, JULIA TERESA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONKEY BRAINS $3,060.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
